retrieved_result: How Fast Do Sunflower Seeds Grow? Home »Produce How Fast Do Sunflower Seeds Grow? By Jenn Mercer; Updated September 21, 2017Sunflower seeds take 10 to 14 days to germinate, and they bloom two months after germination. Their mature height can vary from 18 inches to 15 feet, depending on variety. References Old Fashioned Living: Anyon
